name: Ames Home Areas
description: Living area (sq ft) of 2,930 homes in Ames, Iowa. Population dataset for sampling demos.

name: Ames Home Prices
description: Sale prices ($) of 2,930 homes in Ames, Iowa. Right-skewed population dataset for sampling demos and descriptive stats.

name: Ames: Price vs Area
description: Sale price vs living area for 2,930 homes in Ames, Iowa. Classic regression example.

name: Antibiotic Use by Condition
description: Medical conditions requiring antibiotic treatment. n=92. IMS Ch. 3, 5.

name: iPod Question Framing
description: 219 participants: does framing an iPod purchase question differently affect the decision? Three question types (control, give up, keep) x two outcomes. IMS Ch. 18.

name: Avandia Cardiovascular Outcomes
description: Cardiovascular event outcomes for rosiglitazone (Avandia) vs. pioglitazone across clinical trials (proportional sample, n=2000). IMS Ch. 7.

name: Crawling Age vs. Temperature
description: Average crawling age (weeks) vs. average outdoor temperature (°F) at 6 months. n=12 birth months. IMS Ch. 7.

name: Beers vs. Blood Alcohol
description: Number of beers consumed and resulting blood alcohol content (BAC) for 16 students. Strong linear relationship. IMS Ch. 7, 24.

name: Ball Bearing Life Span
description: Life span (millions of revolutions) for 75 ball bearings.

name: Baumann Reading Methods
description: Reading-comprehension scores for 66 students randomized to three instruction methods (Ch. 22 ANOVA).

name: Body Dimensions (Height)
description: Heights (cm) of 507 physically active adults. Use to build a bootstrap CI for mean height.

name: BioNTech COVID Vaccine (Adolescents)
description: COVID-19 outcomes for vaccinated vs placebo adolescents (12-15). IMS Ch. 1.

name: Births: Gestation vs Weight
description: Gestation weeks vs birth weight (lbs) for US babies, 2014. IMS Ch. 24.

name: Birth Weight by Smoking
description: Birth weights (lbs) of babies born to smokers vs. nonsmokers (2014 US births). IMS Ch. 20.

name: Birth Weights (2014)
description: Birth weights (lbs) of 1,000 US babies born in 2014. Use to build a bootstrap CI for mean weight.

name: Blood Pressure Medication
description: Systolic blood pressure (mmHg) before and after medication for 15 patients.

name: Body Temperature (Generated)
description: Simulated body temperatures for 50 healthy adults, generated from a normal distribution. Use with ?gen_seed= for per-student unique data.

name: Brexit Survey
description: Survey responses on how Brexit negotiations are going (n=900, IMS Ch. 3)

name: Burger Preferences
description: Survey of 500 people on their favorite burger restaurant, with gender. IMS Ch. 2.

name: CAOS Pretest/Posttest
description: Paired pre/post CAOS statistics-assessment scores for 10 students (Ch. 20 paired data).

name: Deck of Playing Cards
description: Standard deck of 52 playing cards with suit and color.

name: Cat Body & Heart Weight
description: Body weight (kg) and heart weight (g) for 144 domestic cats. IMS Ch. 19-20.

name: Cherry Trees: Diameter vs Volume
description: Trunk diameter (in) vs timber volume (cu ft) for 31 black cherry trees. IMS Ch. 25.

name: Chicken Weights by Feed
description: Weights (g) of chicks after 6 weeks on one of 6 different feed supplements. n=71. IMS Ch. 12.

name: Internet Use & Life Expectancy
description: Internet usage percentage vs life expectancy for 208 countries (IMS Ch. 2)

name: Exam Scores by Lecture
description: Midterm exam scores for students in 3 lecture sections. IMS Ch. 20, 22.

name: Amtrak Travel Times
description: Travel times (min) between 16 stations on the Coast Starlight Amtrak route.

name: Amtrak: Distance vs Travel Time
description: Distance (miles) vs travel time (minutes) for 16 Coast Starlight Amtrak segments. IMS Ch. 7.

name: Corn Seed Yield
description: Corn yield (lbs/acre) from regular vs kiln-dried seed on 11 paired plots.

name: US County Demographics (2019)
description: Median household income, poverty rate, and unemployment rate for US counties (2019). IMS Ch. 19.

name: County Housing & Homeownership
description: Multi-unit housing percentage vs homeownership rate for 3,142 US counties (IMS Ch. 1)

name: US County Median Income
description: Median household income ($) of US counties. Right-skewed.

name: County Income & Education
description: Per capita income vs bachelor's degree percentage for 3,142 US counties (IMS Ch. 2)

name: County Income & Population Change
description: Median household income vs population change for 3,137 US counties (IMS Ch. 1)

name: County Income by Population Change
description: Median household income and population gain/loss for 3,137 US counties (IMS Ch. 3)

name: US Counties (Multi-variable)
description: Median income, poverty, unemployment, region, and metro status for US counties. Good for multi-variable exploration.

name: US County Population
description: Population of US counties in 2017. Heavily right-skewed.

name: US County Poverty Rate
description: Poverty rate (%) of US counties. Approximately symmetric.

name: County: Poverty vs Income
description: Poverty rate (%) vs median household income ($) for US counties. Negative association.

name: CPR & Blood Thinner
description: 90 heart attack patients: survival by blood thinner treatment vs. control. IMS Ch. 11, 17.

name: Cuckoo Egg Lengths
description: Lengths (mm) of cuckoo eggs found in nests of 6 different host bird species. n=120. IMS Ch. 16.

name: Diabetes Treatment Outcomes
description: Diabetes management outcomes for 3 treatment groups: lifestyle, metformin, and placebo. IMS Ch. 18.

name: Diamond Price vs. Carat
description: Price ($) and carat weight for 100 randomly sampled diamonds. IMS Ch. 12.

name: Dolphins Mercury
description: Mercury levels (ppm) in muscle tissue of 19 Risso's dolphins. Classic small-sample bootstrap CI example.

name: DREAM Act Survey
description: Survey of 910 people on the DREAM Act by political ideology. IMS Ch. 4, 18.

name: Student and Parent Drug Use
description: Student drug use status vs parent drug use status. n=445.

name: Duke Forest Home Prices
description: Sale price ($) vs. area (sq ft) for homes in Duke Forest, Durham NC. IMS Ch. 7.

name: Elmhurst: Income vs Gift Aid
description: Family income ($1000s) vs institutional gift aid ($1000s) for 50 Elmhurst College freshmen.

name: Email Character Count
description: Number of characters (thousands) in 50 emails. Right-skewed distribution.

name: Environmental Regulation Views
description: Survey of 705 Americans on environmental regulation: necessary vs. does more harm. IMS Ch. 2.

name: EPA Fuel Economy by Transmission
description: City MPG for automatic vs. manual transmission vehicles (2021 EPA data, n=201 sample). IMS Ch. 20.

name: Teaching Evaluations
description: Teaching evaluation scores vs instructor attractiveness for 463 UT Austin courses.

name: Teaching Evals by Rank
description: Course evaluation scores for 463 courses by instructor rank: teaching, tenure track, tenured. p-value > 0.05.

name: Exam 1 vs. Exam 2 Scores
description: Exam 1 and Exam 2 scores for statistics students. IMS Ch. 18-19.

name: Fast Food Calories by Restaurant
description: Calorie content of menu items from 8 fast food chains. Unequal group sizes.

name: Fast Food Calories
description: Calorie content of menu items from major fast food restaurants.

name: Fish Oil Heart Study
description: Major cardiovascular events for fish oil vs placebo in large trial (n=25,871). IMS Ch. 17.

name: Florida Lakes (Mercury)
description: Water chemistry and fish mercury for 53 Florida lakes — pH/alkalinity vs mercury (Ch. 7, 24 regression/correlation).

name: Friday the 13th Traffic
description: Traffic volume on Friday the 6th vs. Friday the 13th at the same locations. Is there less traffic on the 13th? IMS Ch. 21.

name: Gifted Children: Mother IQ vs Score
description: Mothers IQ vs childs analytical aptitude score for 36 gifted children.

name: Study Hours vs GPA
description: Weekly study hours vs GPA for 193 college students.

name: GSS: Relaxation by Education
description: Hours per day spent relaxing by education level (5 groups) from 2010 General Social Survey. IMS Ch. 16.

name: Heart Transplant Survival
description: Survival outcome for heart transplant patients (treatment) vs. control group. IMS Ch. 11, 17.

name: Helium Football Kick Distance
description: Distance (yards) of football punts with air-filled vs. helium-filled balls. Same kicker for each pair. IMS Ch. 21.

name: Hollywood Movies 2023
description: Budget, rating, and opening weekend for a small set of 2023 films (Ch. 4 describing/relationships).

name: Homeownership Status
description: Homeownership status of 10,000 Lending Club loan applicants (IMS Ch. 3)

name: Math Scores by Program
description: Math achievement test scores for 200 high school students in 3 program types: general, academic, vocational.

name: Student Read vs. Write Scores
description: Standardized reading and writing test scores for 200 high school students. Same students took both tests. IMS Ch. 21.

name: Immigration Views by Politics
description: Views on immigration policy by political affiliation. 4 political groups × 3-4 response levels. IMS Ch. 4, 18.

name: Insect Sprays
description: Insect counts on plots treated with six sprays, n = 72 (Ch. 22 ANOVA).

name: Jury Racial Composition
description: Race of 275 jurors from a county, used to assess if jury composition reflects the community. IMS Ch. 2, 18.

name: Lizard Habitat Preference
description: Perch sunlight preference (sun, shade, partial) for lizards at 3 sites. IMS Ch. 18.

name: Lizard Sprint Speed
description: Top sprint speed (m/s) for two lizard species: Sagebrush lizard vs. Western fence lizard. IMS Ch. 20.

name: Loan50 (Lending Club)
description: A 50-loan sample from the Lending Club peer-to-peer platform — borrower, loan, and credit variables (IMS Ch. 1, 8).

name: Loan Amounts
description: Loan amounts ($) for 50 Lending Club loans.

name: Loan Applicant Income
description: Total annual income ($) of 50 Lending Club loan applicants. Right-skewed.

name: Loan Interest Rates
description: Interest rates (%) on 50 loans from Lending Club. Use to build a bootstrap CI for the mean rate.

name: Loan50 Interest Rates
description: Interest rates for a 50-loan sample from Lending Club (Ch. 12, 19 bootstrap CI for a mean).

name: Loan: Income vs Amount
description: Total income ($) vs loan amount ($) for 50 Lending Club loans.

name: Malaria Vaccine Trial
description: Malaria infection outcomes for vaccine vs. placebo groups in a randomized trial. n=20.

name: Mammal Sleep & Body Data
description: Sleep hours, brain weight, body weight, and gestation for mammals. IMS Ch. 5.

name: Mammogram Screening Study
description: Breast cancer death outcomes for mammogram vs control over 30 years. IMS Ch. 17.

name: Manhattan Apartment Rent
description: Monthly rent ($) for 20 one-bedroom apartments in Manhattan.

name: Mario Kart: Price vs Bids
description: Total price ($) vs number of bids for new-condition Mario Kart Wii eBay auctions.

name: Masters Winners (Ages)
description: Winning golfer age by year at the Masters Tournament, n = 87 (Ch. 7 relationships / trend).

name: Medical Consultant
description: Complication outcomes for 62 patients of a medical consultant. 3 of 62 had complications (p̂ = 0.048). National complication rate is 10%. IMS Ch. 12, 16.

name: Midterm Elections and Unemployment
description: Unemployment rate vs change in House seats for president party. n=31 midterms. IMS Ch. 24.

name: Migraine Acupuncture Trial
description: Pain-free outcomes for migraine patients receiving acupuncture (treatment) vs. sham acupuncture (control). IMS Ch. 1.

name: MLB On-Base Percentage by Position
description: On-base percentage by field position for MLB players (2018). IMS Ch. 22.

name: NBA Player Heights
description: Heights (inches) of NBA players. Approximately normal distribution.

name: NBA Salaries 2022
description: Salaries (millions) for 467 NBA players, 2022 — a strongly right-skewed distribution (Ch. 5, 12).

name: NC Birth Weight by Smoking (2004)
description: Birth weights (lbs) of babies born to smokers vs. nonsmokers in North Carolina, 2004. IMS Ch. 20.

name: NYC Marathon Winning Times
description: Winning times (hours) for the NYC Marathon by year and division. IMS Ch. 5.

name: Opportunity Cost
description: 150 participants: does reminding about saving change purchase decisions? IMS Ch. 11.

name: Oscar Winner Ages
description: Ages of Best Actor and Best Actress Oscar winners by year. n=184. IMS Ch. 5.

name: Penny Ages
description: Ages of 648 pennies sampled in 2004. Use to build a bootstrap CI for the mean age.

name: Plant Growth by Treatment
description: Dried weight (g) of plants under control and 2 treatment conditions. Classic ANOVA dataset. n = 30.

name: Durham Air Quality (2022)
description: Daily PM2.5 and AQI for Durham NC, 2022. Right-skewed. IMS Ch. 5.

name: Brushtail Possums
description: Body measurements for 104 brushtail possums trapped in Australia (IMS Ch. 7, 8 regression/correlation).

name: Possum: Head Length vs Skull Width
description: Head length (mm) vs skull width (mm) for 104 mountain brushtail possums.

name: Possum Body & Head Length
description: Total body length vs head length for 104 mountain brushtail possums (IMS Ch. 18-20)

name: Prison MMPI Scores
description: MMPI psychopathic deviate scores before and after treatment for 14 inmates.

name: Pulse: Quiz vs Lecture
description: Each student’s pulse during a quiz vs a lecture, n = 10 paired (Ch. 20 paired data).

name: Resume Callback Study
description: Job callback rates by perceived race of applicant name. n=4,870. IMS Ch. 9.

name: Cherry Blossom Race Times
description: Finish times (minutes) for 100 runners in the 2017 Cherry Blossom 10-mile race. IMS Ch. 19.

name: Sales by Pay Type
description: Sales totals for 15 employees across three pay structures — small 3-group comparison (Ch. 22 ANOVA).

name: SAT Score vs College GPA
description: Combined SAT score vs first-year college GPA for 1000 students.

name: Sex Discrimination
description: 48 bank supervisor files: promotion decision by applicant sex. Classic randomization test example. IMS Ch. 11.

name: Sinusitis Antibiotic Trial
description: Self-reported improvement for sinusitis patients: antibiotic vs placebo. IMS Ch. 1.

name: Sleep Remedies
description: Extra hours of sleep gained under two drugs for 10 patients (Student 1908).

name: College Sleep Study
description: Sleep, mood, and academics survey for 253 college students (Ch. 4, 7 EDA). Curated subset of variables.

name: Smallpox Inoculation
description: Smallpox outcomes for inoculated vs not. Historical data. n=6,224.

name: UK Smoking Survey
description: Smoking status by gender, marital status, and education for 1,691 UK residents.

name: Starbucks: Calories vs. Protein
description: Calorie content vs. protein (g) for Starbucks food menu items. IMS Ch. 7.

name: Stem Cell Heart Repair
description: Change in heart pumping capacity (after − before) for sheep receiving embryonic stem cell treatment vs. control. IMS Ch. 20.

name: Stent Stroke Outcomes
description: Stroke outcomes within 30 days for 224 patients who received a stent. IMS Ch. 1, 16.

name: Supreme Court Approval
description: Poll of 976 Americans on approval of the US Supreme Court. IMS Ch. 2.

name: Tappers and Listeners
description: Song identification results for 120 listeners who tried to guess songs tapped out by tappers. IMS Ch. 8.

name: UCLA Textbook Prices
description: Prices ($) of 73 textbooks at the UCLA bookstore vs. Amazon. Are UCLA prices higher on average? IMS Ch. 20.

name: Heart Transplant Survival
description: Survival outcomes for 34 heart transplant patients. 24 of 34 survived (p̂ = 0.706). Build a bootstrap CI for the true survival rate.

name: Cherry Tree Diameter & Volume
description: Diameter (in) and timber volume (cu ft) for 31 black cherry trees. IMS Ch. 18.

name: Twins IQ Scores
description: IQ scores of identical twins raised apart: foster home vs biological parents. n=27 pairs.

name: UC Berkeley Admissions
description: Admission decisions by gender and department at UC Berkeley. Simpsons paradox. n=4,526.

name: Homeownership vs. Urbanization
description: Homeownership rate (%) vs. urban population (%) for 52 US states/territories. IMS Ch. 19-20.

name: US States (2010s)
description: Demographic, health, and political measures for the 50 US states (Ch. 7 relationships). Curated subset.

name: Contagious Yawning
description: 50 participants: did they yawn after seeing a yawn seed vs. control? IMS Ch. 11.

name: Zinc in Water
description: Zinc concentrations (mg/L) in bottom vs surface water at 10 paired locations.
